pi_items.metadata_value: Autumn wildlife corridor survey through Middlesex Fells Reservation. Route follows primary ridge trail for annual raptor census.
pi_items.verified_value: Autumn wildlife corridor survey through Middlesex Fells Reservation. Route follows primary ridge trail for annual raptor census.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the fells_loop.gpx file, a real GPS dataset created by TopoGrafix for the Middlesex Fells Reservation. Although the task description instructs the agent to edit an 'existing track', the GPX file only contains route data (<rte> tags) named 'BELLEVUE' and no track data (<trk> tags). The expected track name, display color, and description exactly match the explicit string instructions provided in the task description.
